chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P.No.S-389 of 2021. _____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.939/2021 (U/A). 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.940/2021 (E/A). 04. For hearing of main case. 11.11.2021 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Larik, Advocate for the petitioner. = * = * = * = * = * = 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 4. Under the garb of harassment, the petitioner is seeking direction against the police for restoration of possession of her property with registration of FIR against the persons involved in such illegal action, which could not be ordered for the reason that the issue of possession or dispossession of the petitioner from her property, involving factual controversy, could not be resolved by this Court in exercise of its constitutional jurisdiction. Consequently, the instant constitutional petition is dismissed in limine. However, the petitioner may exhaust the alternate remedy available at law for redressal of her grievance, if so is advised. J U D G E
